title: Slovakian Vegetable Roast
description: A hearty and flavorful vegetarian dish featuring a variety of roasted vegetables and pecorino cheese, with a yeasty twist from beer, this Slovakian inspired recipe is perfect for a cold winter night, the combination of vegetables and cheese creates a juicy and savory experience.
instructions: In a large bowl, toss the carrots, brussels sprouts, red bell pepper, and onion with the olive oil, salt, and black pepper until they are evenly coated.
Spread the vegetables in a single layer on a large baking sheet.
Roast the vegetables in the preheated oven for 30 minutes.
While the vegetables are roasting, mix the beer and pecorino cheese in a small bowl.
After the vegetables have roasted for 30 minutes, pour the beer and cheese mixture over them.
Return the vegetables to the oven and continue roasting for an additional 20 minutes.
Remove the vegetables from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes before serving.
Serve the Slovakian vegetable roast hot, garnished with additional pecorino cheese if desired.
